basic_details.job_title: East Coast Railway Junior Engineer (OP) Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: East Coast Railway has published the Junior Engineer (OP) Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Junior Engineer (OP) position. Candidates with a maximum age of 47 years and holding a Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering, ITI/ACT Apprenticeship Pass, or 10+2 in Science Stream are eligible to apply offline at https://rrcbbs.org.in. The application process will be active until 10 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering or ITI/ACT Apprenticeship Pass or 10+2 in Science Stream.
qualification.details: Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering branch including their sub stream branches, if any Qualification of ITI/ACT Apprenticeship Pass 10+2 in Science Stream Should have working as Technician in Electrical (OP) Department/KUR Division and have completed 03 years of continuous Railway service in skilled grade as on the date of notification.

selection_process: Written examination on CBT/TBT Mode Scrutiny of Service Record
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for East Coast Railway Junior Engineer (OP) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://rrcbbs.org.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
